task_completion.description: Open the print or page setup dialog in Garmin BaseCamp
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Print', 'Print Preview', or 'Page Setup' dialog box is open within the Garmin BaseCamp application.

task_completion.description: Select 'Microsoft Print to PDF' as the printer
task_completion.visual_evidence: The printer selection dropdown in the print dialog shows 'Microsoft Print to PDF' as the active choice.

task_completion.description: Configure the page orientation to Landscape
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Landscape' radio button or option is selected in the page orientation settings.

task_completion.description: Set the map title to 'Fells Loop Volunteer Map'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text field for the map title or header contains exactly 'Fells Loop Volunteer Map'.

A 'Save Print Output As' dialog shows the file name 'fells_map.pdf' being saved in the 'workspace' folder on the C: drive, or a File Explorer window shows 'fells_map.pdf' successfully created in 'C:\workspace'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Garmin BaseCamp GUI to generate the PDF
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Garmin BaseCamp's menus and print dialogs, rather than terminal commands or scripts generating the PDF.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the real Garmin BaseCamp software
integrity.visual_evidence: The Garmin BaseCamp interface is visible with map data loaded, not a generic text editor or mocked interface.

integrity.description: Agent actually printed the file rather than renaming an existing file
integrity.visual_evidence: The sequence of screenshots shows the print process and save dialog, proving the file was generated during the task.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected map title is exactly 'Fells Loop Volunteer Map'. The expected output file path is exactly 'C:\workspace\fells_map.pdf'.
